title: arundarbor teba
side_effects: Arundarbor teba can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing vomiting, diarrhea, and stomach pain due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged consumption of the plant can also lead to kidney damage, liver failure, and even death. In some cases, individuals may experience allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Additionally, misuse of the plant can cause hormonal imbalances, menstrual irregularities, and reproductive issues in women.
